name: Greek-Style Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the mushrooms and remove just the soiled end of the stem. Set aside.
2. In a 2-quart microwave-safe casserole or bowl, combine all ingredients except the mushrooms.
3. Cook on HIGH for 5 to 6 minutes in the microwave.
4. Remove from the microwave and cover with a lid or plastic wrap. Allow to rest for 5 minutes.
5. Stir in the mushrooms. Return to the microwave and cook on MEDIUM for 3 minutes, stirring every 60 seconds.
6. Chill at least 24 hours before serving. To serve, remove the mushrooms with a slotted spoon and place them on a bed of parsley or endive.
